title: Section 34
content: (1) The Collection of Statistics Act, 1953 (32 of 1953) is hereby repealed. (2) Notwithstanding such repeal, anything done or any action taken under the said Act shall be deemed to have been done or taken under the corresponding provisions of this Act. (3) All rules made under the said Act shall continue to be in force and operate till new rules are made under this Act.
